name: Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Add the vanilla and lemon extracts to the mixture.
3. Stir in the hot water and chopped dates and pecans.
4. Mix in the beaten eggs until combined.
5. Fold in the baking powder and salt that have been sifted together.
6. Pour the batter into an 8 x 10 x 12 inch pan, spreading it out evenly.
7. Bake for 30 minutes at 325°F.
- Turn off the heat once the desired doneness is reached.
